statement: Trees X0 (two warn findings) and X1 (one bad): S(X0)=7/16 < S(X1)=11/20 but Lambda(X0)=4 > Lambda(X1)=1/4 under explicit equal-support rational P,Q.

latent_defect_cover.note: X0: one defect d_common activates two warn codes; X1: one defect d_lie activates one bad

notes: Kills Bayes-monotone reading of severity-only product score. Novelty of qualitative claim may be low (MIRROR); CHARM-specific constants locked.
